race.description: Tickets On Sale For Anzac Day Maiden Plate
race.comment: AFLOAT (1) surrendered an early lead then battled on just fairly last time out in a Class 1 over the mile at Newcastle. Very fit after three runs back and meets a weaker field this time. Looks the testing material despite being on trial at nine furlongs. SIR TUA (4) backs up four days after picking up late to grab second over 1600m at Wyong. Good sign from the stable that they have opted to accept on a quick turnaround. That provincial form lines up well in a race of this calibre. Curious placement for TOKYO QUEEN (8) who has never raced beyond the mile and is first-up from a five-month spell. Only lightly raced - worth monitoring the market for any telltale signs. TAKE THE CHANCE (7) led but found one better over 2000m at Queanbeyan recently. Will run the trip for sure unlike some other key runners. LUCKY STAR (9) was a real eye-catcher over the mile at Orange last start. Will be hard to hold out over the extra furlong today.
